items.claim: Jerk is very open to getting his legs snatched and taken down.
items.quote: He's very open to getting his legs snatched and taken down.

items.claim: Jerk had a sloppy, messy fight against Brunson.
items.quote: Jerk has had sloppy, messy fight against Brunson as well.

items.claim: Kamar has excellent control once he gets the fight to the mat.
items.quote: once he gets this to the mat, he has excellent control.

items.claim: Kamar has longevity in the sport due to his style.
items.quote: He has a lot of longevity in this game due to his style.

items.claim: Kamar relies on endurance, non-stop chain wrestling, and power.
items.quote: He uses his endurance, non-stop uh chain wrestling and power to his advantage.

items.claim: Drius has the ability to scramble and work his way back up to his feet.
items.quote: I think Drius is going to scramble, work his way back up and show levels.

items.claim: Drius possesses significant power in his hands.
items.quote: Kamar Usman spoke about when he sparred Drius Di remembers feeling the power in Drias' hands.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a takedown-or-bust fighter.
